calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER ALEXIS ROSE TAYLOR'S PETITION FOR NAME CHANGE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Alexis Rose Taylor.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:42:41 a.m. and concluding at 10:45:30 a.m.

Petitioner Alexis Rose Taylor appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed May 19, 2023.

Order to show cause filed May 19, 2023.

Notice of hearing filed October 10, 2023.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.
